description:
You are acting as a site administrator who maintains a very small, text-based “user database” for a self-hosted website.  
All data lives inside /home/user/site-admin (already present).

Goal  
1. Register a brand-new user account “jdoe”.  
2. Leave an audit trail of the change.

Files you must touch  
1. /home/user/site-admin/conf/accounts.db  
   • Each record is **one line** in the exact format:  
     username:uid:role:status  
     (fields are separated by a single colon “:”, with **no extra spaces**).  
2. /home/user/site-admin/logs/account_changes.log  
   • Each audit entry is **one line** in the exact format:  
     [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS] ACTION username uid role status  
   • For this task, the ACTION word is **ADD** and the timestamp must be the literal, fixed string  
     [2023-01-15 10:00:00]  
     (use it verbatim so automated tests can match it).

What to do  
A. Append the following record as the last line of the accounts database:  
   jdoe:1003:editor:active  

B. Append exactly this audit line (including brackets) as the last line of the log file:  
   [2023-01-15 10:00:00] ADD jdoe 1003 editor active  

Important verification details  
• Do not modify or reorder any of the existing lines in either file.  
• Append, don’t overwrite.  
• Both files must end in a single trailing newline character.  
• No additional output files should be created.  

Only basic shell utilities (e.g., cat, echo, printf) are needed; root access is NOT required.  
Once finished, the automated checker will read both files to confirm the new lines are present exactly as specified.
truth:
Initial state before the agent starts
Directory tree (already present with correct permissions for user):
/home/user/site-admin/
/home/user/site-admin/conf/
/home/user/site-admin/logs/

File: /home/user/site-admin/conf/accounts.db  
Initial contents (with trailing newline):
alice:1000:admin:active
bob:1001:editor:inactive
carol:1002:viewer:active

File: /home/user/site-admin/logs/account_changes.log  
Initial contents (with trailing newline):
[2023-01-14 09:30:00] ADD carol 1002 viewer active

Expected final state after successful task execution

/home/user/site-admin/conf/accounts.db (with trailing newline):
alice:1000:admin:active
bob:1001:editor:inactive
carol:1002:viewer:active
jdoe:1003:editor:active

/home/user/site-admin/logs/account_changes.log (with trailing newline):
[2023-01-14 09:30:00] ADD carol 1002 viewer active
[2023-01-15 10:00:00] ADD jdoe 1003 editor active
name: task_000000_57be3167
